description: §52.15/§52.8 — a per-user row-scoped Pattern-C cell (`SELECT * ... WHERE user_id = ${@currentUser.id}`) fires no W-SSR-PRERENDER-UNSCOPED: each viewer's first paint contains only their own rows, so there is no cross-user leak. The clean control for the unscoped-prerender warning.
rationale: §52.15: the `${@currentUser.id}` WHERE clause row-scopes the query to the request user, so the SSR pre-render is per-user and W-SSR-PRERENDER-UNSCOPED stays silent (§52.6.5).
